title: LETMY Pack of 2 Small LED Torches, 300 Lumens Super Bright Mini Torch Battery Powered with 3 Modes and Adjustable Focus for Camping, Hiking, Gift
features: ✅【Super Bright & Long-lasting】300 Lumens output(Max) and up to 600 feet beam distance makes this torch stand out among many ordinary small flashlights. 50,000-hour lifespan saves your money for frequent torches replacement.

✅【Great for Multi Use】3.6 inches—perfect size for your palms, pockets and purses. Portable to carry with a metal clip. One torch battery powered for camping, fishing and more, you can carry and use it everywhere.
✅【Small but Complete】Military grade aluminum alloy body. High quality LED bulb. Anti-slip, drop-resistance and waterproof. To keep practicality and safety, no detail is missed in this mini torch.

✅【In Control】High/Low/Strobe Mode, controlled with a single button. Zoom in & out for different beam range. Powered by 1xAA Battery or rechargeable battery. You are the commander of the light in your hands.
🎁【Ideal Pocket Torch】Lightweight and useful, perfect torch for friends, family, or colleagues who will appreciate this practical and convenient gift in daily life.
description: Product Description Getting tired of wasting your money on those poor torches anymore? Here comes with LETMY small torches!! Portable, durable and lightweight torches withcomplete functions. Super Bright : 100% brand new Mini 300 Lumens led Flashlight. The Beam can sweep light over the length of two football fields on a clear night . Zoomable & Portable flashlight, zoom out to get the highest bright intensity. Zoom in to increase the illumination area. Different Modes of use : High / Low / Strobe (for Cycling) , always start at High. Aluminum Alloy material, drop resistance flashlight, not even a scratch will left on the flashlight if you drop the flashlight. A Single Battery will give you more than a solid hour of brilliant bright light. Or Last a couple of weeks with normal daily use. A perfect option for cycling, camping, hunting and fishing Specification Flashlight Bulb Type: LED Switch: Tail-cap press ON/OFF Size: 9.4*2.6*2.6cm Weight : 60g each Body Material: aluminum alloy Battery Required: Yes (batteries not included) Battery Type: a single AA Battery 3 Modes:High / Low / Strobe Package Included 2x Small Torches 1x User Manual

specifications_table.Fixture Features: Durable, Adjustable Light Modes, Adjustable Focus, Lightweight, Rechargeable, Non Slip Grip, Weatherproof, Zoomable. Long Range
